synopsis: Dr. Slump movie 5.

title: Ganbare! Kakure Ase Project
titleNative: がんばれ！隠れ汗 プロジェクト
synopsis: An animated commercial directed by Yoshihiro Kanno for Kao Corporation. The theme song track is "I can" by Sayaka Inoue. Promoting Kao Bioré Sarasara Powder Sheets, the ad stars three high school friends, one a flutist named Mina and the other a burgeoning photographer named Akane. Mina finds herself getting wistful as the school year is drawing to a close but through the encouragement of her friends, she's reinvigorated to make the year the best it can be. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

tags.name: Advertisement

title: Tsubu★Doll
synopsis: With the stage set for 16 girls in Sagamihara, they will fulfill their dreams in a local idol story. Rather than focusing on girls aiming to become top idol, the story will show realistic girls that could exist anywhere as they devote their energy towards idol activities in Sagamihara. The Tsubu Doll members are "local idols" living in Sagamihara instead of regular idols.

tags.name: Idol
tags.description: Centers around the life and activities of an idol.

tags.name: Primarily Female Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of female characters.

title: Summer Pockets: Naruse Shiroha-hen
titleNative: Summer Pockets 鳴瀬しろは編
synopsis: Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Shiroha Naruse storyline from the anime series. Shiroha, a girl who keeps her distance from the people on the island and is always alone, gradually begins to open up to Hairi, who unreservedly gets closer to her. Over the course of the summer, Hairi witnesses the "mysterious power" that Shiroha possesses... (Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title: Oh! Family
synopsis: This story takes place in Los Angeles, USA. The main characters are the lovable members of the Andersons; each one has his or her own different characterstics which conflict and support the others'. By going through many events (meaningful ones as well as weird ones) together, the bond between them grows stronger and tighter.

title: Kanagawa Elves
synopsis: 2 years ago, the elves who lived in the hidden forest lost their homes due to a forest fire, now they are living in the Kanagawa Prefecture. This story however focuses on a human who becomes the roommate of an elf living in an apartment. (Source: MU)

title: Hello Kitty: Stump Village
titleNative: ハローキティのスタンプヴィレッジ
synopsis: A Hello Kitty claymation series. The Stump Village itself is a group of tree stump houses located in a secluded area of a forest. The village residents are a tight-knit bunch: Badtz Maru, Cinnamoroll, My Melody, Pom Pom Purin, and Hello Kitty.

title: Ai no Wakakusa Yama Monogatari
synonyms: アニメ愛のあわあわアワー
Anime no Ai Awa Awa Hour
synopsis: The comic story of Shizuka, the eldest daughter, who lives at home, showing no signs of getting married; her mother, who is both annoyed with Shizuka, and at the same time concerned about her window of eligibility; her sister Ikumi, with whom she gets along, even though they fight; and her father, who feels henpecked in this all-female household. Note: Part of Anime no Ai Awa Awa Hour (アニメ愛のあわあわアワー), three relationship-related comedy series aimed at women that were aired on the same day.

title: Catman Series II
synopsis: In a city filled with anthropomorphic cat-people, Catman lives free of rules and boundaries, doing everything he wants, which often collides with the other inhabitants of the city. Created entirely in flash, with no spoken dialog, Catman instead speaks in English and Japanese subtitles. The series is spread across three so-called 'seasons', with only the third having been aired.

title: Startling Doctor
synopsis: Haruka Nishikikoji is an overweight doctor that never seems to attract any girls. Fate finds a way as he lands a job as a doctor in an elementary school, wherein his workplace can be found on top of the schools' roof and the actual clinic looks like a medieval castle. Just when everything seems to go downhill, a surprise came one day, her first love Koizumi Miyuki, applies as her soon to be nurse.

I'm Joybo: Words From My Heart
synopsis: Second season of Wo Shi Jiang Xiaobai: Shijie Shang de Lingyi Ge Wo, confirmed at the end of the special episode.

title: Otohime CONNECTION
synopsis: Special based on the manga by Ooya Kazumi, published in Betsukomi Flower Comics. An all-male pop group doubles as a detective agency. The cute girl member of the agency is kidnapped when one of the men's past returns to trouble them all in the present. (Source: sandg-anime)

title: Fuyu no Chikai, Natsu no Matsuri: Takeo no Ookusu
titleRomaji: Fuyu no Chikai, Natsu no Matsuri: Takeo no Ookusu
titleNative: 冬の誓い　夏の祭り　武雄の大楠
synopsis: The anime is set in the city of Takeoshi, and will center on two characters, a boy and a girl, who grow up watched over by a large camphor tree that endures the time and seasons. It will star Nao Touyama as Rinko Yamaguchi, and Nobunaga Shimazaki as Souta. It will screen in the Saga Prefectural Space and Science Museum. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Summer Pockets: Sorakado Ao-hen
synopsis: Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Ao Sorakado's storyline from the anime series. While Hairi becomes close to Ao, a girl from the island who always seems sleepy for some reason, he witnesses Ao carrying out a "duty" that has been passed down through the generations of the Sorakado family. While helping with this "duty", Hairi learns the secret of the "butterfly" and Ao's true purpose. (Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title: Tottoko Hamtarou Anime Dechu!
titleNative: とっとこ ハム太郎 アニメ でちゆ!
synopsis: Tottoko Hamutaro Anime Dechu! is a direct-to-VHS OVA released on September 15, 1999. This was the first attempt at an animated adaptation of Hamtaro, and consists of four short episodes. The VHS was only released as a mail-order from the September 1999 issue of Shogakukan, and given away for free to Shogakukan staff with preschool children. (Source: Hamtaro Wikia)

うたう！おどる！チルタリス！

Episodes: #1 Bonding with Kangaskhan / Mega Hanasenai ne Garura (めがはなせないね ガルーラ), released October 3, 2025. #2 Tomorrow with Gardevoir / Ashita mo Sirknight to (明日もサーナイトと), released October 24, 2025. #3 Utau! Odoru! Tyltalis! (うたう！おどる！チルタリス！), released February 13, 2026.
